summary: The diff implements both REQ-1 (edit grave plot number/alley from admin panel) and REQ-2 (delete grave with confirmation dialog from admin panel). Both the AdminGraveTileMap and GraveManagement list views are wired to GraveEditDialog, which includes editable alley/plot number fields (using useUpdateGraveLocation), a delete button with AlertDialog confirmation, and the backend exposes updateGrave/updateGraveLocation/removeGrave functions. Most acceptance criteria appear to be met. One area of uncertainty is whether validation for empty or duplicate plot numbers within the same alley is fully implemented, as the diff is truncated before the full save logic is visible.

missing_requirements.requirement: Validation prevents saving an empty or duplicate plot number within the same alley.
missing_requirements.reason: The GraveEditDialog file is truncated before the save/validation logic is shown. The diff does not provide sufficient evidence that duplicate plot number validation within the same alley is implemented.

hallucinated_features.description: useUpdateGraveLocation hook added as a separate mutation distinct from useUpdateGrave, specifically handling alley and plot number location changes.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only asked for an updateGrave (or equivalent) backend function. A separate dedicated location-update mutation was added without being explicitly requested, though it serves the requirement.
